channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: NFL legend compares Jared Goff to Tom Brady after impressive comeback victory vs. Vikings
item.description: NFL legend and five-time Super Bowl champion Terry Bradshaw compared Jared Goff to the goat Tom Brady after the Detroit Lions took down the Minnesota Vikings 31-29.
item.dc:creator: Brandon Carr, Local 4

item.title: Dodgers finish off Mets with 10-5 win in NLCS
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Shohei Ohtani carried the injury-riddled Los Angeles Dodgers to baseball's best record during the regular season. Tommy Edman joined the team in late July and helped them reach the World Series. It's been that kind of year for the big-spending Dodgers.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Fox News Digital Sports' college football winners and losers for Week 8
item.description: Another week is in the books, and Fox News Digital gives you the college football winners and losers from an entertainment-filled Week 8.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: New York Liberty wins first WNBA championship
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — As confetti fell and Frank Sinatra’s “New York, New York” blared through the arena, the New York Liberty celebrated the end of a long odyssey.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Russell Wilson's Steelers debut spoils Aaron Rodgers' reunion with Davante Adams in beatdown on Jets
item.description: Russell Wilson's debut as the Pittsburgh Steelers starting quarterback spoiled Davante Adams' debut with the New York Jets, as the black and yellow crushed Gang Green at home.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Coach Cheryl Reeve says WNBA title was 'stolen' from the Lynx during complaints about officiating
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Minnesota coach Cheryl Reeve said the WNBA championship was “stolen” from the Lynx during her complaints about the officiating Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN MAHONEY, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Russell Wilson throws for 2 TDs, runs for another TD in Pittsburgh debut as Steelers rout Jets 37-15
item.description: Russell Wilson threw for two touchdowns and ran for another score in his Pittsburgh debut to lead the Steelers to a 37-15 win over Aaron Rodgers and the New York Jets.
item.dc:creator: Will Graves, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Dodgers finish off Mets with 10-5 win in NLCS and advance to face Yankees in World Series
item.description: Tommy Edman and Will Smith homered to send Shohei Ohtani into the World Series for the first time, and the Los Angeles Dodgers eliminated the New York Mets with a 10-5 victory in Game 6 of the NL Championship Series.
item.dc:creator: Beth Harris, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: J.T. Poston ends long day in Las Vegas with 3rd career PGA Tour title
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — J.T. Poston used a burst of birdies to build a comfortable lead in the morning and afternoon, first for a three-shot lead after 54 holes and then to give himself a big enough cushion to hold on for a 4-under 67 and a one-shot victory Sunday in the Shriners Children's Open.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Now we’ll see how 49ers’ Brock Purdy handles real adversity
item.description: Brock Purdy's three interceptions for the 49ers with no touchdown passes led to a career-low 36.7 passer rating.
item.dc:creator: Jerry McDonald, The Mercury News

item.title: Travis Kelce calls 49ers defense ‘best challenge in league,’ Mahomes talks Collins hit after Super Bowl rematch
item.description: Patrick Mahomes on Maliek Collins hitting striking him after an interception: "“I’m hoping that he didn’t do it intentionally"
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: SEC fines Tennessee $100,000 for rushing the field after win over Alabama
item.description: While Tennessee was fined $100,000 when fans rushed the field after beating Alabama in 2022, this penalty is the school's first violation since the policy was revised last year.
item.dc:creator: Gregory Raucoules, NewsNation

item.title: Ricky Pearsall gives 49ers a lift with his return. But they lose Brandon Aiyuk to a knee injury
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — The San Francisco 49ers got a lift from rookie receiver Ricky Pearsall making his NFL debut exactly 50 days after being shot in the chest but might have lost starting receiver Brandon Aiyuk to a significant knee injury.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Commanders lose Jayden Daniels to a rib injury in a 40-7 romp over the Panthers
item.description: LANDOVER, Md. (AP) — Jayden Daniels' health was the first thing on Marcus Mariota's mind when he went into the game for the injured rookie quarterback. Then he just played football like he has his whole life.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jayden Daniels to get further tests Monday after leaving the Commanders' game with a rib injury
item.description: LANDOVER, Md. (AP) — Jayden Daniels will undergo further tests Monday after leaving the Washington Commanders’ game against the Carolina Panthers with a rib injury, coach Dan Quinn said, repeatedly adding he had no further update on the rookie quarterback's status.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Pennsylvania high school football team dominates opponent despite having just 11 players
item.description: It's common for football teams to seek out as much depth as possible for its roster, but a high school football team was uniquely shorthanded during a recent game.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NFL stadiums will lose $11B from climate threats by 2050: Report
item.description: “This report is a wake-up call for the NFL, stadium owners, and local governments,” said Climate X CEO Lukky Ahmed.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, NewsNation

item.title: Michael Kopech to open bullpen game for Dodgers against Mets in Game 6. Freddie Freeman out for LA
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Michael Kopech will start Game 6 of the National League Championship Series for the Los Angeles Dodgers, who plan to send a parade of relievers to the mound in an attempt to win their record 25th NL pennant.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Arnold Palmer's daughter reacts to Donald Trump's references to her father
item.description: One of the late golf legend Arnold Palmer's daughters calls Donald Trump’s references to her father’s genitalia "a poor choice of approaches” to honoring his memory.
item.dc:creator: Meg Kinnard, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Bigsby scores 2 TDs as Jaguars show fight in 32-16 win over Patriots in London
item.description: LONDON (AP) — The Jacksonville Jaguars didn't show any quit this week after falling behind early on Sunday against the New England Patriots. The Jaguars trailed 10-0 before rallying and overpowering the Patriots 32-16 at Wembley Stadium. “This is what our team can do,” coach Doug Pederson said.
item.dc:creator: KEN MAGUIRE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Slot hails 'hardest' win as Liverpool stays above Man City by beating Chelsea 2-1 in Premier League
item.description: Liverpool is looking more and more like Manchester City’s main title rival after beating resurgent Chelsea 2-1 on Sunday to stay top of the Premier League table.
item.dc:creator: MATTIAS KAREN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Browns' Deshaun Watson carted off field with apparent Achilles injury
item.description: Cleveland Browns quarterback Deshaun Watson appeared to suffer a serious Achilles injury on Sunday against the Cincinnati Bengals and was carted off the field.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Texas apologizes to Georgia players, staff, SEC and game officials after fans throw trash on field
item.description: AUSTIN, Texas (AP) — Georgia coach Kirby Smart was initially careful with his words when asked about Texas fans littering the north end of the field with water bottles and other trash after an interception for the top-ranked Longhorns was briefly wiped out by a pass-interference penalty before offic
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jaguars come back from double-digit deficit over Patriots thanks to Tank Bigsby's career game in London
item.description: Tank Bigsby ran for 118 yards and two touchdowns as the Jacksonville Jaguars fought back from a 10-point deficit to beat the New England Patriots in London.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Saquon Barkley returns to MetLife — with the Eagles
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – Former Giants running back Saquon Barkley will step back inside MetLife Stadium on Sunday as a member of the Eagles. Newsday Giants beat reporter Kim Jones joins New York Blitz to discuss what to expect from fans and why Barkley wasn’t a Giant “for life.
item.dc:creator: Marc Malusis, PIX 11

item.title: Olympian to drug lord: Snowboarder accused of running drug ring
item.description: Wedding competed for Canada in the 2002 Winter Olympics in Salt Lake City; according to the official Olympics website, he finished 24th in the parallel giant slalom event.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, NewsNation

item.title: Lynx force Game 5 of WNBA Finals on Carleton's free throws to beat Liberty 82-80
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (AP) — With their season on the line, the Minnesota Lynx did just enough to stave off elimination and force a decisive Game 5 of the WNBA Finals. Bridget Carleton made two free throws with 2 seconds left, and the Lynx beat the New York Liberty 82-80 on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Yankees get to Guardians closer Clase again, score 2 runs in 9th to win 8-6 and take 3-1 ALCS lead
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Cleveland All-Star closer Emmanuel Clase gave up two runs in the ninth inning and the New York Yankees moved closer to another World Series, beating the Guardians 8-6 on Friday night to take a 3-1 lead in the American League Championship Series.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Former Bears quarterback Jay Cutler arrested for DUI, gun charge
item.description: FRANKLIN, Tenn. — Former Bears quarterback Jay Cutler was arrested Thursday in Tennessee for allegedly driving intoxicated. Officers responded to the 200 block of Bridge Street at around 5 p.m. in Franklin, Tennessee on the report of a minor traffic collision involving two vehicles.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, ABC 4

item.title: Grand Junction football cruises to third straight league win
item.description: Entering Thursday with their best start (6-1) since 2011, Grand Junction welcomed 4A I-25 league foe Centaurus.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Shohei Ohtani homers as the Dodgers rout the Mets 8-0 for a 2-1 lead in the NLCS
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — By the time Shohei Ohtani stepped to the plate in the eighth inning Wednesday night, the Los Angeles Dodgers were already in control. Once the ball left his bat, Game 3 of the National League Championship Series was over.
item.dc:creator: MIKE FITZPATRICK, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Grand Junction's Luis Mendez is a goal machine
item.description: Through 11 games this season, Grand Junction has scored 37 goals. Luis Mendez has 28 of them. 28 goals in 11 games.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Former SJSU basketball standout found dead in Romania
item.description: (KRON) -- Former San Jose State University Women's Basketball standout Tyra Whitehead has passed away, according to a social media post from SJSU Women's Basketball. Whitehead was a forward who went on to become a WNBA prospect with the Washington Mystics.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: Tom Brady's purchase of a minority stake in the Las Vegas Raiders is approved by NFL team owners
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — Tom Brady has another new role in the NFL: owner. The seven-time Super Bowl champion purchased a minority stake in the Las Vegas Raiders, a deal unanimously approved by NFL team owners on Tuesday at the league's annual fall meeting.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Los Angeles Rams implementing new AI technology during football games
item.description: The technologically advanced home of the Los Angeles Rams is about to have a new way for fans to track players’ statistics from their seats during the game.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5
